creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
Created attachment 152012
diff of the alpine directory so far

As the portmaintainer of the mail/alpine port I am trying to upgrade the port to the new 2.20 version. Due to a plist/staging error I can't get rid of, I am unable to do this and need some help to solve it.

The remaining error:

===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: %%DOCSDIR%%/tech-notes/tech-notes.txt
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Many thanks in advance.

Regards,
Marco
